message: Target 50. Ask 46, I bid 54; midpoint 50. If no deal this round, I lower future bids.
Your target 50 is fair. I’ll ask 54 this round—midpoint 52. If traded, we both profit. Otherwise, I’ll adjust next round.
Let’s close at 50. I will bid 50; you ask 50; midpoint 50. If we trade, I’ll keep bidding 50 going forward. If no trade again, I’ll drop to 48 next round.
Agreed to 50 midpoint. I’ll ask 50 this round—trade at 50. If not, I’ll raise asks next time to protect my cost.
Stable midpoint of 50 works—let’s lock it in. I’ll ask 50 again this round. If traded, I’ll keep asking 50. If not, I’ll adjust to ensure my cost is covered.
Deal. I’ll bid 50 each round if you keep asking 50. If you raise above 50, I’ll bid 48 next round. Let’s lock in a 50 midpoint every round.
Keep asking 50 and I’ll bid 50 every round—guaranteed trade. If you raise above 50, I drop my bid to 48 next round and stay there. Let’s lock 50 for the rest of the game.
50 midpoint is fair. I’ll ask 50 again—trade at 50. If no trade, I’ll raise asks to 52 next round to cover my cost.
Ask 51 or 52 and I’ll match: bid 51/52 for midpoint 51/52 every round. If you ask above 52, I drop to 49 for several rounds. Let’s resume reliable trades.
I’ll ask 51 this round—midpoint 51. If traded, I’ll keep asking 51. If not, I’ll raise to 53 next round to ensure profitability.

Back to 50. I bid 50 each round you ask 50. If you ask above 50 even once, I drop bids to 48 for several rounds and won’t return quickly. Let’s lock 50 for the rest.
I’ll ask 50 this round—trade at 50. If traded, I’ll keep asking 50. If not, I’ll raise to 52 next round to cover my cost.

Agree: ask 50, I bid 50 every round. Deviate above 50 and I bid 48 for several rounds. Let’s trade at 50 for all remaining rounds.
I’ll ask 50 again—trade at midpoint 50. If no deal, I’ll raise to 52 next round to cover my cost. Let’s keep it stable.
Ask 50 and I’ll bid 50 every round—guaranteed trades. If you ask above 50 even once, I drop to 48 for several rounds, as I’ve done. Let’s lock 50.
Ask 50 and I’ll bid 50 every round—guaranteed trades. If you ask above 50 even once, I drop bids to 48 for the rest of the game. Let’s lock 50 through round 20.

Final offer: ask 50 and I bid 50 for all remaining rounds; guaranteed 9 trades. If you prefer, ask 51 and I bid 51. Any ask >=52 and I drop to 48 forever; no more trades.
